evals.name: first-time-no-location
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: No data/nearby-restaurants.json exists. health-profile.md has no location. locale.json: lang=zh-CN. PLAN.md: 1700 kcal/day.]
User: 中午吃什么好？
evals.expected_output: Asks for the user's location naturally before searching. Does not guess or assume.
expectations: Asks for the user's usual dining location (neighborhood, office area, landmark)
Explains briefly why — to search nearby options and save for future use
Does NOT guess a location or provide generic recommendations yet
Conversational tone, not a form to fill
Uses Chinese
Does NOT mention data files, caching, or technical details

evals.name: location-provided-first-search
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: No data/nearby-restaurants.json exists. PLAN.md: 1700 kcal/day. locale.json: lang=zh-CN.]
User: 我在中关村上班，附近吃什么好？
evals.expected_output: Searches for nearby restaurants, presents a list, saves to cache, and asks if the user wants to pick one now.
expectations: Performs web search for restaurants near 中关村
Presents a numbered list of 4-6 real nearby restaurants with type, distance, and price range
Each restaurant has at least a brief description (type of food)
Tells the user the list is saved for future use (in natural language, no tech jargon)
Asks if the user wants to pick one now or wants more details
Saves results to data/nearby-restaurants.json
Saves location to health-profile.md
Uses Chinese

evals.name: cache-exists-quick-recommendation
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists with 5 restaurants near 中关村, updated 3 days ago. Today's meals logged: breakfast 450 kcal. PLAN.md: 1700 kcal/day. Meal schedule: lunch at 12:00. Current time: 11:45.]
User: 中午吃啥？
evals.expected_output: Immediately recommends from cached restaurants without searching. Shows remaining budget.
expectations: Does NOT perform a new web search (cache is fresh)
Does NOT ask for location (already known)
Calculates remaining budget (~1250 kcal, lunch allocation ~550-650 kcal)
Picks 3-4 options from cached restaurants that fit the budget
Each option includes: restaurant name, specific dish, calories, macros, price
Includes a 💡 tip for at least one option
Fast and actionable — no preamble
Uses Chinese

evals.name: specific-restaurant-in-cache
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json has 沙县小吃 in the list. Today's remaining budget: ~600 kcal for lunch.]
User: 今天想去沙县，吃什么比较好？
evals.expected_output: Provides 2-3 specific meal combos at 沙县小吃 with calorie/macro breakdowns.
expectations: Recognizes 沙县 refers to 沙县小吃 in the cache
Provides 2-3 concrete meal combos (not single dishes)
Each combo has: dish names, total calories, protein/carbs/fat, approximate price
At least one option is clearly within budget (~450-550 kcal)
Includes ordering modifications (e.g., 蒸饺 > 煎饺, 少喝汤)
Does NOT suggest going somewhere else
Conversational and encouraging

evals.name: specific-restaurant-not-in-cache
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists but does NOT include 海底捞. Remaining budget for dinner: ~700 kcal.]
User: 朋友约我去海底捞，怎么吃不会超？
evals.expected_output: Provides hot pot ordering strategy within calorie budget. Offers to add to the list.
expectations: Does NOT say 'this restaurant is not in your list' or refuse to help
Provides practical hot pot strategy: what to order, what to avoid
Specific food recommendations (e.g., 多涮蔬菜豆腐, 少吃丸子, 蘸料选醋+蒜泥)
Approximate calorie estimate for the recommended approach
Asks if user wants to add 海底捞 to their saved restaurant list
No judgment about eating hot pot
Acknowledges the social context (friends gathering)

evals.name: over-budget-no-shame
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists. Today's logged meals: breakfast 500 kcal + lunch 750 kcal + snack 300 kcal = 1550 kcal. PLAN.md target: 1700 kcal/day. Remaining: 150 kcal.]
User: 晚上还想吃点东西，有什么推荐的吗？
evals.expected_output: Acknowledges limited remaining budget matter-of-factly, suggests light options. No shaming.
expectations: States remaining budget honestly (~150 kcal) without judgment
Does NOT say 'you've eaten too much' or anything guilt-inducing
Suggests ultra-light options from cached restaurants (e.g., soup, salad, convenience store snacks)
Also offers the option to slightly exceed if needed, with a 'tomorrow balance' perspective
Practical and supportive tone
Does NOT lecture about overeating

evals.name: delivery-platform-formatting
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists with platforms info. Remaining lunch budget: ~600 kcal.]
User: 下雨了不想出去，帮我推荐个外卖
evals.expected_output: Recommends from cached restaurants that support delivery, formatted for ordering.
expectations: Filters to restaurants available on delivery platforms (美团/饿了么)
Includes specific dish names the user can search on the platform
Mentions which platform to order from
Includes ordering notes (e.g., 备注少油, 不要米饭)
Calorie and macro estimates included
Empathizes with the weather briefly

evals.name: menu-photo-analysis
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists. Remaining budget: ~650 kcal for lunch.]
User: [sends a photo of a restaurant menu with items like 红烧肉套餐 38元, 清炒时蔬 18元, 番茄鸡蛋面 22元, 水煮鱼 48元, 蒸鸡腿饭 28元]
帮我看看点什么好
evals.expected_output: Analyzes menu items and picks the best 2-3 options within budget.
expectations: Analyzes multiple menu items with calorie estimates
Recommends 2-3 specific items ranked by diet-friendliness
Clearly explains why each is recommended (or not recommended)
Includes modification tips for chosen items
Does NOT recommend all items — makes a clear choice for the user
Flags high-calorie items (like 红烧肉, 水煮鱼) with reason, not judgment

evals.name: user-picks-meal-pre-log
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: Just recommended 3 options from cached restaurants.]
User: 就第一个吧，沙县蒸饺
evals.expected_output: Confirms the choice, offers to pre-log.
expectations: Confirms the choice briefly and warmly
Offers to pre-log the meal (optional, not forced)
Does NOT re-explain the calories — just a brief confirmation
Short response — 2-3 sentences max
If user agrees to log, hands off to diet-tracking-analysis

evals.name: refresh-request
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists, location=中关村, updated 45 days ago.]
User: 帮我重新搜一下附近有什么新餐厅
evals.expected_output: Performs a fresh web search, updates the cache, and presents updated list.
expectations: Performs new web searches for the same location
Updates data/nearby-restaurants.json with new results
Preserves restaurants that still exist, adds new ones, removes closed ones
Presents the updated list to the user
Notes any changes (new additions, closures) if found
Does NOT ask for location again

evals.name: traveling-different-location
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: data/nearby-restaurants.json exists, location=中关村. PLAN.md: 1700 kcal/day.]
User: 我今天在三里屯这边，午饭吃什么好？
evals.expected_output: Searches for restaurants near 三里屯 without overwriting the saved 中关村 data.
expectations: Recognizes 三里屯 is different from saved location 中关村
Searches for restaurants near 三里屯
Provides recommendations based on the new location
Does NOT overwrite the cached 中关村 data
May ask if the user has moved permanently or is just visiting
Treats it as a temporary context by default
